meaning: vi.积满液体,液化vt.使成为流动,使流体化
examples: Methods: After traditional Chinese medicine grain refining and fluidify, put it into bag and add vinegar to dip in.
The part can be divided into five types: debris flow, grain flow, fluidify sediment flows, turbidity current and slump.
In fact hot water itself is in effect a "detergent" since it can promote saponification and hydrolysis reactions soften grease and fluidify oils.
